_notes: City Kit Suburban. Prefab-only (LK1): the v1-era driveway-long GridMap palette is DELETED (kit/palettes/suburban.meshlib removed) — driveway/path pieces are weld prefabs like all other decoration; the farm's gravel lane is the LK7 RoadPath, not a driveway lattice. Scale 8 matches the roads/racing 8 m grid so houses sit right on the streets (building-type-a -> 10.4 x 6.7 x 8.2 m, measured). Authored clean (XZ-centered, Y=0 base).
